figures.caption: Table 1. Stochastic results summary (Simheuristic: K = 200, L = 20; Monte Carlo: N = 1000, β = 0.8). Percent improvement is computed w.r.t. the heuristic baseline on both E[Reward] and Reliability. (Instances p4.2.*.)

Table 2. Stochastic results summary (Simheuristic: K = 200, L = 20; Monte Carlo: N = 1000, β = 0.8). Percent improvement is computed w.r.t. the heuristic baseline on both E[Reward] and Reliability. (Instances p4.3.*.)
